explanation_en: 'Auseinandersetzung' means 'dispute' or 'confrontation'. Feminine, takes 'die'.

question.en: The dispute was very fierce.

explanation_en: 'Auseinandersetzung' is feminine. As the nominative subject, it takes 'die'.

question.de: Die _____ zwischen den Parteien dauert an.
question.en: The dispute between the parties continues.

explanation_en: 'Auseinandersetzung' means 'dispute'. It is the feminine subject here.

question.en: We must face up to this confrontation.

explanation_en: 'stellen' with dative here: 'sich einer Auseinandersetzung stellen'. Feminine dative: 'dieser Auseinandersetzung'.
'Anerkennung' means 'recognition' or 'acknowledgement'. Feminine, takes 'die'.

question.en: The recognition of his work is missing.

explanation_en: 'Anerkennung' is feminine. As the nominative subject, it takes 'die'.

question.en: The recognition of foreign qualifications is important.

explanation_en: 'Anerkennung' means 'recognition'. It is the feminine subject here.

question.de: Sie verdient mehr _____ für ihre Leistung.
question.en: She deserves more recognition for her achievement.

explanation_en: 'verdienen' takes the accusative. 'mehr Anerkennung' — used here without article as a mass noun expressing an amount.
'Herausforderung' means 'challenge'. Feminine, takes 'die'.

question.en: The challenge is enormous.

explanation_en: 'Herausforderung' is feminine. As the nominative subject, it takes 'die'.

question.de: Die _____ des Klimawandels betrifft uns alle.
question.en: The challenge of climate change affects us all.

explanation_en: 'Herausforderung' means 'challenge'. It is the feminine subject here.

question.en: He accepts every challenge.

explanation_en: 'annehmen' takes the accusative. 'jede Herausforderung' — 'jede' is feminine accusative determiner.
'Umsetzung' means 'implementation' (putting a plan into practice). Feminine, takes 'die'.

question.en: The implementation of the strategy takes months.

explanation_en: 'Umsetzung' is feminine. As the nominative subject, it takes 'die'.

question.en: The implementation of the law is complex.

explanation_en: 'Umsetzung' means 'implementation'. It is the feminine subject here.

question.de: Bei der _____ sind viele Probleme aufgetreten.
question.en: During the implementation many problems arose.

explanation_en: 'bei der Umsetzung' — 'bei' takes dative. Feminine dative: 'der Umsetzung'. The noun is unchanged.
'Überzeugung' means 'conviction' or 'firmly held belief'. Feminine, takes 'die'.

question.de: _____ Überzeugung, die er vertritt, ist klar.
question.en: The conviction he holds is clear.

explanation_en: 'Überzeugung' is feminine. As the nominative subject, it takes 'die'.

question.de: Meine _____ ist, dass Ehrlichkeit am wichtigsten ist.
question.en: My conviction is that honesty is most important.

explanation_en: 'Überzeugung' means 'conviction'. After 'meine' (feminine nominative), the noun is unchanged.

question.en: He always acts out of inner conviction.

explanation_en: 'aus innerer Überzeugung' — 'aus' takes dative. Feminine dative: 'innerer Überzeugung' (adjective takes strong ending).
'Voraussetzung' means 'prerequisite' — a condition that must be met beforehand. Feminine, takes 'die'.

question.de: _____ Voraussetzung für den Job ist ein Studium.
question.en: The prerequisite for the job is a university degree.

explanation_en: 'Voraussetzung' is feminine. As the nominative subject, it takes 'die'.

question.de: Die _____ für den Erfolg ist harte Arbeit.
question.en: The prerequisite for success is hard work.

explanation_en: 'Voraussetzung' means 'prerequisite'. It is the feminine subject here.

question.de: Er erfüllt alle _____ für die Stelle.
question.en: He meets all the prerequisites for the position.

explanation_en: 'erfüllen' takes the accusative. Plural: 'alle Voraussetzungen' — adding -en to the singular form.
'Wahrnehmung' means 'perception'. Feminine, takes 'die'.

question.en: Perception can be deceiving.

explanation_en: 'Wahrnehmung' is feminine. As the nominative subject, it takes 'die'.

question.en: The perception of time is subjective.

explanation_en: 'Wahrnehmung' means 'perception'. It is the feminine subject here.

question.en: His perception of the situation is distorted.

explanation_en: After 'seine' (possessive, feminine accusative), 'Wahrnehmung' is unchanged — feminine nominative and accusative are identical.
'Berücksichtigung' means 'taking into consideration'. Feminine, takes 'die'.

question.en: Consideration of all factors is necessary.

explanation_en: 'Berücksichtigung' is feminine. As the nominative subject, it takes 'die'.

question.en: The consideration of costs is decisive.

explanation_en: 'Berücksichtigung' means 'consideration'. It is the feminine subject here.

question.de: Unter _____ aller Umstände ist das vertretbar.
question.en: Taking all circumstances into consideration, this is justifiable.

explanation_en: 'Unter Berücksichtigung' is a fixed phrase meaning 'taking into consideration'. 'unter' takes dative.
'Durchführung' means 'implementation' or 'execution' of a plan or event. Feminine, takes 'die'.

question.en: The execution is in our hands.

explanation_en: 'Durchführung' is feminine. As the nominative subject, it takes 'die'.

question.en: The execution of the experiment was successful.

explanation_en: 'Durchführung' means 'execution'. It is the feminine subject here.

question.de: Bei der _____ der Veranstaltung gab es Probleme.
question.en: During the execution of the event there were problems.

explanation_en: 'bei der Durchführung' — 'bei' takes dative. Feminine dative: 'der Durchführung'. Noun unchanged.
'Einschränkung' means 'restriction' or 'limitation'. Feminine, takes 'die'.

question.en: The restriction is temporary.

explanation_en: 'Einschränkung' is feminine. As the nominative subject, it takes 'die'.

question.de: Die _____ der Reisefreiheit war schwer zu ertragen.
question.en: The restriction on freedom of travel was hard to bear.

explanation_en: 'Einschränkung' means 'restriction'. It is the feminine subject here.

question.en: We do not accept this restriction.

explanation_en: 'akzeptieren' takes the accusative. Feminine: 'diese Einschränkung' (unchanged in accusative).
'Förderung' means 'promotion' or 'funding'. Feminine, takes 'die'.

question.en: The promotion of talented young people is important.

explanation_en: 'Förderung' is feminine. As the nominative subject, it takes 'die'.

question.de: Die staatliche _____ für das Projekt läuft aus.
question.en: The state funding for the project is running out.

explanation_en: 'Förderung' means 'funding'. It is the feminine subject here.

question.de: Die Gemeinde beantragt mehr _____ für Bildung.
question.en: The municipality is applying for more funding for education.

explanation_en: 'beantragen' takes the accusative. 'mehr Förderung' — used without article as a mass noun expressing quantity.
